title: Senior Teacher - TeamLease Skills University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - TeamLease Skills University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the TeamLease Skills University family as a Senior Teacher in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TeamLease Skills University:
TeamLease Skills University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TeamLease Skills University!
